title: [#81] Build Person Detail page with view and edit functionality

risks: TanStack Router useParams() is mocked at module level via vi.mock('@tanstack/react-router') — this is consistent with the established pattern in $id.test.tsx and works correctly with Vitest module hoisting.
The getEmployeeQueryKey factory function returns a readonly tuple — consumers must not mutate it.
LIST_EMPLOYEES_QUERY_KEY is imported from ./new.tsx to avoid duplicating the constant; if new.tsx is ever deleted or renamed this import will break.
The NOT_FOUND error detection relies on duck-typing the error object's 'code' property — if oRPC changes its error shape this could fail silently.

conversation_log.summary: Implemented the employee detail page at apps/frontend/src/routes/employee/$id.tsx. The page fetches a single employee via getEmployee oRPC query, displays name and email TextFields, and allows saving via updateEmployee mutation. On success it shows a success Alert and invalidates both getEmployee and listEmployees query keys. On error it shows an error Alert. Loading state shows CircularProgress. NOT_FOUND error shows a translated message. All user-facing strings are in apps/frontend/src/locales/en/common.json under employee.detail.*. Co-located test file at $id.test.tsx covers AC1–AC9. PR opened.
